interests.title: Interests
interests.summary: Choose interests that match you to get better product and design suggestions across the shop and creator tools.
tips: Choose interests that match you to get better suggestions.
You can select up to 10 interests.
New interest? Type it and I will suggest matching terms.

community.title: Community
community.summary: Grow your network with referral links and earn commission across up to 10 levels.
tips: Share your referral link to grow your network.
Your network has 10 levels and each level earns commission.
Use promo codes to win new partners.

generate-design.title: Design Generator
generate-design.summary: Create AI designs from a text prompt or reference image, then save and publish them.
tips: The more detailed your prompt, the better the result.
You can upload your own image as a reference.
Try different styles for unique designs.
After generation, you can publish the design directly.

my-creations.title: My Creations
my-creations.summary: Browse, filter, and manage all designs you have generated or uploaded.
tips: Click a design to see more options.
You can filter designs by date or type.
Unsaved designs are deleted after 30 days.

publish.title: Publish Products
publish.summary: Place your design on print-on-demand products and publish them to the shop.
tips: Select a design first, then choose products.
You can publish to multiple products at once.
After publishing, you can find the product in the shop.

my-products.title: My Products
my-products.summary: View products you have published and manage their visibility in the shop.
tips: Published products appear in your creator storefront.
You can update mockups and metadata from here.

active-jobs.title: Active Jobs
active-jobs.summary: Track in-progress generation and publishing jobs.
tips: Jobs run in the background while you browse.
You will get a notification when a job completes.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.summary: Save products you like and find them again quickly.
tips: Tap the heart icon on a product to favorite it.
Favorites sync when you are logged in.

gift-cards.title: Gift Cards
gift-cards.summary: Purchase or redeem Eazpire gift cards.
tips: Gift cards can be shared with friends and family.
Redeem a code at checkout.

promo-codes.title: Promo Codes
promo-codes.summary: Create and share promo codes for your community.
tips: Promo codes can offer discounts or track referrals.
Share codes from your community dashboard.

size-ai.title: Size AI
size-ai.summary: Get size recommendations based on your measurements.
tips: Enter your measurements and I will suggest the best size.
Reference sizes help for more accurate recommendations.
The recommendation applies to all product types.

my-orders.title: My Orders
my-orders.summary: View order history, details, and tracking information.
tips: Click an order for details and tracking.
If there is an issue with an order, report it.
You can see your last 10 orders here.

product-search.title: Product Search
product-search.summary: Search the shop by keyword or browse categories.
tips: Enter a search term or choose a category.
You can add products directly to your cart.
Mark favorites with the heart icon for later.

browse-shop.title: Browse Shop
browse-shop.summary: Discover products, trends, and personalized recommendations.
tips: Discover new products and trends.
Recommendations are based on your interests.
You can search for something specific anytime.

wardrobe.title: Wardrobe
wardrobe.summary: Combine up to 9 items into outfits and generate AI outfit previews.
tips: Combine up to 9 items per outfit.
Generate an AI image of your outfit.
You can save up to 20 outfits.

my-mockups.title: My Mockups
my-mockups.summary: Upload photos and generate product mockups.
tips: Upload a photo and I will generate mockups for different products.
Choose the right person type for more realistic results.
Mockups work great as product previews.

hero-images.title: Hero Images
hero-images.summary: Create rotating hero banners for your shop storefront (costs EAZV).
tips: Hero Images cost EAZV and appear as shop title images.
Choose up to 5 products for one hero image.
Published hero images rotate randomly on your shop page.

creator-image.title: Creator Image
creator-image.summary: Set your avatar and cover image shown on your creator profile.
tips: Your avatar is optimized to 512x512 and your cover to 800x300.
You can upload images or generate them with AI.
Your creator image appears on your profile and products.

creator-settings.title: Creator Settings
creator-settings.summary: Manage creator names, filters, EAZ, and publishing defaults.
tips: You can create up to 5 creator names.
The active creator defines the name you publish under.
Filter settings decide which products you see.

balance.title: EAZV Balance
balance.summary: EAZV is your spendable in-app currency for premium Creator features.
tips: Spend EAZV on generations, hero images, and skill unlocks.
Earn EAZV via activity, daily refill, packs, or converting EAZC.
Your max balance increases with your level.

level.title: Creator Level
level.summary: Your level unlocks benefits and raises your maximum EAZV balance.
tips: Your level determines your maximum EAZV balance.
You gain XP through activities like creating designs and publishing products.
There are multiple levels and each unlocks new benefits.

mentor-support.title: Support a Creator
mentor-support.summary: Tip or support other creators in the community.
tips: Support creators you follow or collaborate with.
Tips may use EAZ or shop checkout depending on the flow.

chat-input.title: Chat Input
chat-input.summary: Type a message or use functions from the carousel above the input.
tips: Ask anything about the shop or creator tools.
Use the + button for a new conversation.
Type Support to reach a human.

chat-functions.title: Function Carousel
chat-functions.summary: Quick access to Eazy functions like design generation, orders, and settings.
tips: Tap a function icon to start a guided flow.
Customize visible functions in the Eazy tab with the eye icon.

chrome.brand.title: Eazpire Creator
chrome.brand.summary: Brand mark for your Creator workspace. Outside Guide Mode it opens the Creator portal home.
tips: You are in the Creator area for designs, marketing, and automations.
Use Shop mode when you want to browse the storefront instead.

chrome.journey-star.title: Creator Journey
chrome.journey-star.summary: Opens your Creator Journey — guided tasks that teach the tools and reward XP.
tips: Complete open tasks to progress.
Claim XP when a task is finished.
Journey unlocks help you grow step by step.

chrome.xp-info.title: XP Info
chrome.xp-info.summary: Opens a short explanation of XP and how leveling works.
tips: XP comes from creator activity such as designs and publishes.
Your progress bar shows how far you are to the next level.

chrome.copy-link.title: Copy Link
chrome.copy-link.summary: Copies your creator share link to the clipboard.
tips: Share the link so others can find your storefront.
Pairs well with the Share button next to it.

chrome.share.title: Share
chrome.share.summary: Shares your creator link via the device share sheet or a fallback.
tips: Great for inviting fans and partners.
Works best when you are logged in.

chrome.screen-title.title: Page Title
chrome.screen-title.summary: Shows which Creator screen you are on (Dashboard, Generator, Creations, Marketing, or Automations).
tips: The title updates when you switch screens.
Use the sidebar (desktop) or swipe / menu (mobile) to change screens.

chrome.eazy.title: Eazy
chrome.eazy.summary: Your assistant. Double-click while snapped to enter Guide Mode; single-click to exit Guide Mode.
tips: In Guide Mode, tap any highlighted control to learn what it does.
Use Prompt to ask deeper questions about your selection.

chrome.audio-visualizer.title: Audio Library
chrome.audio-visualizer.summary: Opens the creator audio library for background music during your session.
tips: Pick tracks that fit your creative mood.
Use the playback controls beside the visualizer.

chrome.audio-back.title: Rewind
chrome.audio-back.summary: Jumps the current track back about 10 seconds.
tips: Use with Play/Pause and Next for quick control.

chrome.audio-play.title: Play / Pause
chrome.audio-play.summary: Starts or pauses the current audio track.
tips: Open the visualizer to browse the full audio library.

chrome.audio-fwd.title: Next Track
tips: Useful while you keep working in Creator.

chrome.eazc.title: EAZC Balance
chrome.eazc.summary: Your earnings balance (EAZC) from sales and community. Opens Balance & Payouts.
tips: Available and pending EAZC are shown here.
Convert EAZC to EAZV in Settings → EAZ if you want to spend inside Creator.
Cash out via Balance & Payouts.

chrome.settings.title: Creator Settings
chrome.settings.summary: Opens Creator Settings for profile, EAZ, filters, and publishing defaults.
tips: Manage creator names and preferences here.
EAZV details and conversion live in the EAZ tab.

chrome.mode-shop.title: Shop Mode
chrome.mode-shop.summary: Switches from Creator tools to the shop experience.
tips: Use Shop to browse and buy.
Creator is for designing, publishing, and marketing.

chrome.mode-creator.title: Creator Mode
chrome.mode-creator.summary: You are in the Creator workspace for designs, marketing, and automations.
tips: Stay here to create and manage your catalog.

chrome.limit-uploads.title: Daily Uploads
chrome.limit-uploads.summary: How many image uploads you have left today.
tips: Limits reset on the countdown timer.
Higher levels or EAZV skills can raise allowances.

chrome.limit-generations.title: Daily Generations
chrome.limit-generations.summary: How many AI design generations you have left today.
tips: Each generate counts toward this limit.
Watch the reset timer on the right.

chrome.limit-publishes.title: Daily Publishes
chrome.limit-publishes.summary: How many product publishes you have left today.
tips: Publishing a design to a product uses this quota.

chrome.limit-countdown.title: Limit Reset Timer
chrome.limit-countdown.summary: Time remaining until daily upload, generation, and publish limits reset.
tips: Plan heavy create or publish sessions before reset if you are near the cap.

chrome.nav-dashboard.title: Dashboard
chrome.nav-dashboard.summary: Home overview: level, journey, stats, and quick actions.
tips: Start here for progress and shortcuts.

chrome.nav-generator.title: Generator
chrome.nav-generator.summary: Create new AI designs from a prompt and optional reference images.
tips: Best place to start a new design.

chrome.nav-creations.title: Creations
chrome.nav-creations.summary: Your design library and published products.
tips: Switch between Designs and Products tabs.

chrome.nav-marketing.title: Marketing
chrome.nav-marketing.summary: Content creation, publishing, and promotions for your shop.
tips: Skill-tree layout: create → publish → promote.

chrome.nav-automations.title: Automations
chrome.nav-automations.summary: Schedule recurring design generation and later publish or marketing jobs.
tips: Design Generator automations are available first.

chrome.mobile-menu.title: Menu
tips: Switch screens or Shop/Creator mode from here.

chrome.mobile-dots.title: Screen Indicators
chrome.mobile-dots.summary: Shows which mobile screen you are on. Swipe left or right to change screens.
tips: Five dots = five Creator screens.

chrome.copyright.title: Copyright
tips: Informational only.

chrome.terms.title: Terms & Policies
chrome.terms.summary: Opens legal terms and policies for the Creator platform.
tips: Read these before publishing commercially.

chrome.language.title: Language
chrome.language.summary: Changes the UI language for Creator.
tips: Your choice is remembered for later visits.

chrome.eazv.title: EAZV Balance
chrome.eazv.summary: Spendable in-app currency for features such as generate, hero images, and unlocks.
tips: Different from EAZC (earnings).
Earn via activity, convert from EAZC, or buy packs.
Opens EAZ settings.

dashboard.journey-section.title: Your Creator Journey
dashboard.journey-section.summary: Guided onboarding tasks that teach Creator tools and reward XP.
tips: Finish open tasks, then claim XP.
The progress bar shows overall completion.

dashboard.journey-tab-open.title: Open Tasks
dashboard.journey-tab-open.summary: Journey tasks you still need to complete.
tips: Outside Guide Mode, tap a task to jump to the right screen.

dashboard.journey-tab-completed.title: Completed Tasks
tips: Review what you have unlocked.

dashboard.journey-item.title: Journey Task
dashboard.journey-item.summary: A single journey step. Completing it earns XP.
tips: Some tasks open settings or other screens.
Look for claim XP when a task is ready.

dashboard.overview.title: Overview
dashboard.overview.summary: Snapshot of your creator activity: designs, products, heroes, and sales on mobile.
tips: Cards jump to the matching screen outside Guide Mode.

dashboard.stat-sales.title: Sales
dashboard.stat-sales.summary: Opens your sales and earnings overview.
tips: Shown in the mobile overview row.
Tracks eazpire and Amazon sales context.

dashboard.stat-designs.title: Designs
dashboard.stat-designs.summary: Count of generated and uploaded designs. Opens Creations → Designs.
tips: Generated vs uploaded are shown separately.

dashboard.stat-products.title: Products
dashboard.stat-products.summary: Count of online and offline products. Opens Creations → Products.
tips: Online means visible in the shop.

dashboard.stat-heroes.title: Hero Images
dashboard.stat-heroes.summary: Count of generated and online hero banners. Opens Marketing.
tips: Heroes rotate on your shop storefront.

dashboard.quick-actions.title: Quick Actions
dashboard.quick-actions.summary: Shortcuts to the most used Creator flows.
tips: Same destinations as the sidebar, with short descriptions.

dashboard.qa-generator.title: Design Generator
dashboard.qa-generator.summary: Jump to the Generator to create a new design.
tips: Fastest path to a new artwork.

dashboard.qa-designs.title: My Designs
dashboard.qa-designs.summary: Jump to Creations → Designs to manage artwork.
tips: Activate, filter, or open a design from there.

dashboard.qa-content.title: Content Creation
dashboard.qa-content.summary: Jump to Marketing to create hero images and other content.
tips: Part of the marketing skill tree.

dashboard.qa-products.title: My Products
tips: Manage published listings.

dashboard.qa-automations.title: Automations
dashboard.qa-automations.summary: Jump to Automations to schedule design generation.
tips: Useful once you have a repeatable prompt style.

dashboard.section-reorder.title: Reorder Sections
dashboard.section-reorder.summary: Drag handle to change the order of dashboard sections on mobile.
tips: Personalize what appears first.

generator.target-product.title: Target Product
generator.target-product.summary: Choose which product type the design should fit, or Anything for flexibility.
tips: Anything keeps the design usable across more products.

generator.design-type.title: Design Type
generator.design-type.summary: Style family for generation (for example Classic).
tips: Different types change look and composition.

generator.upload.title: Upload Reference
generator.upload.summary: Optional reference image to guide the AI.
tips: Clear photos and simple subjects work best.
Counts toward daily uploads.

generator.reference-images.title: Reference Images
generator.reference-images.summary: Selected references and how strongly they influence the result.
tips: Remove or adjust influence before generating.

generator.suggest.title: Suggest
generator.suggest.summary: Fills or improves the prompt with AI suggestions.
tips: Good when you need a starting idea.

generator.clear.title: Clear
generator.clear.summary: Clears the prompt and related draft fields.
tips: Use before starting a completely new idea.

generator.prompt.title: Design Prompt
generator.prompt.summary: Describe the design you want. More detail usually means better results.
tips: Mention subject, style, colors, and mood.
Pair with a reference image if needed.

generator.more-options.title: More Options
generator.more-options.summary: Extra generation settings and advanced controls.
tips: Open when you need finer control than the main form.

generator.generate.title: Start Generation
generator.generate.summary: Starts an AI design job. Costs EAZV and uses a daily generation slot.
tips: Confirm cost before running.
Results appear in Creations and notifications.

creations.tab-designs.title: Designs Tab
creations.tab-designs.summary: All designs you generated or uploaded.
tips: Open a card for preview and actions.

creations.tab-products.title: Products Tab
tips: Online and offline status is managed here.

creations.view-mode.title: View Mode
tips: Pick denser grids when browsing many items.

creations.search.title: Search
creations.search.summary: Filter the current list by text.
tips: Works on Designs and Products.

creations.filter.title: Filter
creations.filter.summary: Narrow by status, type, or other criteria.
tips: Combine with search for faster finding.

creations.upload.title: Upload Design
creations.upload.summary: Upload your own artwork into the library.
tips: Uses a daily upload slot.

creations.activity-active.title: Active Designs
creations.activity-active.summary: Designs currently active in your library.
tips: Active designs can be used for products.

creations.activity-inactive.title: Inactive Designs
tips: Reactivate or unlock when needed.

creations.count.title: Item Count
creations.count.summary: How many designs or products match the current filters.
tips: Updates as you search or filter.

creations.design-card.title: Design Card
creations.design-card.summary: One design. Opens preview or Design Studio outside Guide Mode.
tips: Product badge shows linked products.
Activate or deactivate controls library state.

creations.products-badge.title: Linked Products
creations.products-badge.summary: Number of products created from this design.
tips: Opens product context from the design.

creations.library-btn.title: Activate / Deactivate / Unlock
creations.library-btn.summary: Changes whether the design is available in your library.
tips: Unlock may cost EAZV depending on your rules.

creations.product-card.title: Product Card
creations.product-card.summary: One published product. Opens product preview or editor outside Guide Mode.
tips: Check online vs offline status in Overview.

marketing.content-creation.title: Content Creation
marketing.content-creation.summary: Create marketing assets: hero images, video, and later images.
tips: Expand to see creation tools.
Hero Images open a dedicated create flow.

marketing.content-publish.title: Content Publish
marketing.content-publish.summary: Manage assets you already created — libraries and publish status.
tips: Separate from creation: here you review what you have.

marketing.promotion.title: Promotion
marketing.promotion.summary: Shop promotions and discounts for your storefront.
tips: Create active or upcoming offers from here.

marketing.hero-images-create.title: Hero Images (Create)
marketing.hero-images-create.summary: Create rotating shop title or hero banners. Costs EAZV.
tips: Up to 5 products per hero.
Published heroes rotate on your shop.

marketing.video-create.title: Video
tips: Opens Video Studio and Video Generator tools.

marketing.images-create.title: Images
marketing.images-create.summary: Extra image creation tools — coming soon.
tips: Placeholder until the feature ships.

marketing.video-studio.title: Video Studio
marketing.video-studio.summary: Edit and assemble marketing videos from tracks and saved projects.
tips: Use for longer edited clips.

marketing.video-generator.title: Video Generator
marketing.video-generator.summary: Generate motion or video clips for marketing.
tips: Faster path when you want AI-assisted motion.

marketing.publish-heroes.title: Published Hero Images
marketing.publish-heroes.summary: Grid of hero images ready or already online.
tips: Empty state appears when you have none yet.

marketing.publish-videos.title: Published Videos
tips: Open a card for preview outside Guide Mode.

marketing.publish-images.title: Published Images
tips: Coming soon until image publish is enabled.

marketing.promo-tab-active.title: Active Promotions
marketing.promo-tab-active.summary: Promotions currently live in your shop.
tips: Edit a card to change discount or dates.

marketing.promo-tab-upcoming.title: Upcoming Promotions
marketing.promo-tab-upcoming.summary: Scheduled promotions that have not started yet.
tips: Prepare campaigns before go-live.

marketing.promo-tab-ended.title: Ended Promotions
tips: Useful for repeating successful offers.

marketing.promo-tab-all.title: All Promotions
tips: Fast overview across campaigns.

marketing.promo-new.title: New Promotion
tips: Set discount, dates, and targeting in the editor.

marketing.promo-card.title: Promotion Card
marketing.promo-card.summary: One promotion with status and discount summary.
tips: Opens the editor for that promotion outside Guide Mode.

automations.tab-design.title: Design Generator Automations
tips: Main automation area available today.

automations.tab-publish.title: Publish Automations
tips: Placeholder until enabled.

automations.tab-marketing.title: Marketing Automations
automations.tab-marketing.summary: Automate marketing posts or content — coming soon.
tips: Placeholder until enabled.

automations.status-active.title: Active
tips: Toggle Active on a card to pause or resume.

automations.status-scheduled.title: Scheduled
automations.status-scheduled.summary: Automations waiting for their next run.
tips: Check last run and generation counts on cards.

automations.status-expired.title: Expired
tips: Recreate or edit if you need them again.

automations.add.title: Add Automation
tips: Define schedule, prompt style, and limits in the create flow.

automations.card.title: Automation Card
automations.card.summary: One automation: title, created date, last run, and generations.
tips: Title opens edit outside Guide Mode.
Preview opens overview.
Active switch pauses new runs.

automations.active-toggle.title: Active Switch
automations.active-toggle.summary: Pause or resume this automation without deleting it.
tips: Paused jobs stop new runs.
